title: Determining a Model for Tides
body: The height of the tide in a small beach town is measured along a seawall. Water levels oscillate between $$7$$ feet at low tide and $$15$$ feet at high tide. On a particular day, low tide occurred at $$6$$ AM and high tide occurred at noon. Approximately every $$12$$ hours, the cycle repeats. Find an equation to model the water levels.
